programmes.show_description: How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Action thriller with Steven Seagal. A former federal agent helps a mysterious woman steal money from a sadistic drug lord, but can he survive the deadly game of cat and mouse that follows? (2016)
Mannering makes a deal with a crooked insurance agent to get a deal on a priceless Aztec mask.
Steed and the team find themselves in danger as a prolific criminal looks to exact their revenge on them .
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Powerful western with Willie Nelson and Morgan Fairchild. When his wife betrays him, a preacher transforms from righteous saint to murderous sinner. But will fate give him a shot at salvation? (1986)
Join officers from New Zealand Police as they patrol the streets and race to the scene of real-life emergency calls.
Join officers from New Zealand Police as they patrol the streets and race to the scene of real-life emergency calls.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

An enemy agent imprisons Steed and creates a doppelganger of him to jeopardise a peace conference. Tara faces a race against time to locate the real Steed before disaster strikes.
Tara visits a quaint hotel to collect her uncle after he fails to return home. But she soon realises that she and the other guests may never be allowed to leave alive.
Billy Blue Cannon faces possible hanging when he is court-martialled on the charge of killing an army general's son.

Western starring Sterling Hayden. After the Civil War a rancher is wrongfully imprisoned in a notorious desert prison. When a deadly plague threatens to overwhelm the jail, can he help stop it? (1952)

Western starring Sterling Hayden. After the Civil War a rancher is wrongfully imprisoned in a notorious desert prison. When a deadly plague threatens to overwhelm the jail, can he help stop it? (1952)
Swords 'n' sandals epic starring Richard Egan. King Leonidas leads 300 Spartans against the vast Persian army in the legendary Battle of Thermopylae. Also starring Ralph Richardson. (1962)

An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Hollister becomes suspicious that a number of strangers in town may be part of an imprisoned outlaw's gang.
Henry Silva guest-stars as a revolutionary who plans to assassinate Benito Juarez, exiled President of Mexico, on the Cannon ranch.
After being knocked unconscious Brett awakes in a fake hospital, from which he escapes. After finding Danny he discovers that he has a double who has been impersonating him.
With Tara on holiday, Steed recruits his aristocratic friend to help him find the assassin responsible for the deaths of multiple agents. The case soon leads them to an unlikely killer.
Tara and Steed investigate when members of the Institute of Timber Technology are killed. Will The Avengers locate the killers before they have the chance to execute their deadly masterplan?
Action thriller with Scott Adkins and Wade Barrett. An ex-federal agent is forced out of hiding to protect his daughter. With a deadly assassin now on his trail, can he keep his family alive (2016)?

Action thriller with Scott Adkins and Wade Barrett. An ex-federal agent is forced out of hiding to protect his daughter. With a deadly assassin now on his trail, can he keep his family alive (2016)?
Tense thriller with Randy Couture. After he's sabotaged by those closest to him during a bullet-ridden heist, a brilliant thief manages to survive - and vows to kill everyone who betrayed him (2022).

Mannering finds himself impeded by the tyrannical government of a war-ravaged country's secret police.
The Ministry suspect that Steed has become a double agent when he starts to behave suspiciously. But can he keep his secret safe and save Purdey ?
Contemporary western with Tom Berenger, Luke Perry and Burt Reynolds. Three brothers are pulled into a fiery conflict between old cowboys and new homesteaders. (1/2) (2002).

Explosive western with Trace Adkins and Ron Perlman. For ranch enforcer South, justice is a loaded gun. But he's about to discover a dark secret behind his life of violence and bloodshed... (2014)

Suspenseful western with Chill Wills, Lance Fuller and Cathy Downs. When a gun-filled wagon breaks down in enemy territory, will its occupants surrender their cargo or fight for their lives (1955)?

An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
After a gang robs the saloon, the leader kills two of his men and flees Tombstone.
Claibourne witnesses Vic Reel kill a newspaperman from Denver; in his efforts to uncover the motive for the murder, Hollister succeeds in the capture of the Taylor gang.
Buck Cannon goes to work as a foreman for a lovely neighbouring widow, and clashes with his brother John when the job appears permanent.
Following coincidental events in a Brighton casino, Danny is mistaken for a Soviet spy and given a mysterious list of names. But British Intelligence is far from happy.
Steed and Tara investigate when national security is compromised by a foreign agent who has devised ingenious methods of extracting top secret information out of British agents.
Knocked out in pursuit of a rogue agent, Steed awakes to the sight of a deserted London under the control of an embittered Brigadier with explosive plans.

Espionage thriller starring Pierce Brosnan. A CIA veteran is lured out of retirement to protect a witness, but it's master vs protégé when his former student shows up with orders to kill her... (2014)

Espionage thriller starring Pierce Brosnan. A CIA veteran is lured out of retirement to protect a witness, but it's master vs protégé when his former student shows up with orders to kill her... (2014)
Sci-fi action with Ethan Hawke and Succession's Sarah Snook. A temporal agent who stops crimes before they happen is tasked with catching a fugitive who's always one step ahead in time. (2015)
